name: Miracle Hill
about: Miracle Hill Golf & Tennis is a multi-sport venue in Omaha, Nebraska featuring an 18-hole championship golf course, eight indoor tennis courts, and a year-round practice facility powered by TopTracer. The venue offers a full range of activities including golf, tennis, pickleball, and TopTracer simulator experiences. With a history dating back to 1961, Miracle Hill provides a family-friendly environment for both learning and play. The facility includes on-site amenities like custom club fitting, pro shop, and event hosting capabilities, making it a versatile destination for golfers and tennis players alike.

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food and beverage service required; all food and drink must be purchased at Miracle Hill

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor golf range powered by TopTracer technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, so players should bring their own clubs. Custom club fitting services are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, all food and drink must be purchased at Miracle Hill - outside food and beverages are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue doesn't specify typical play times, but as a championship 18-hole course, standard rounds typically take 4-5 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Miracle Hill offers junior golf programs and youth tennis clinics with dedicated coaches, making it family-friendly with programs for young players.
